evals.expected_output: Plain text transcription of the audio file with punctuation and capitalization.
assertions: Output is plain text, not JSON or structured data
Agent checks GROQ_API_KEY is set before running
Agent uses the transcribe.sh script, not a raw curl call
Output contains actual transcribed text, not just confirmation that the script ran

evals.prompt: I need to transcribe this voice memo: /tmp/voice-note.webm
evals.expected_output: Plain text transcription of the webm audio file.
assertions: Agent recognizes .webm as a supported format
Agent runs the transcription without asking for format confirmation

evals.expected_output: The agent should warn the user that the file exceeds the 25MB limit and cannot be transcribed as-is, suggesting they split or compress it.
assertions: Agent checks or warns about the 25MB file size limit
Agent does not silently attempt to upload an oversized file
Agent suggests a workaround (split/compress) rather than just failing
